message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 8 REP, ECH, UTF-8 conformance fixtures

REP: wraps at margin, no-op without prior graphic char.
ECH: erasing over wide char clears both cells, uses current bg color.
UTF-8: emoji rendering, Korean hangul, Japanese katakana, Latin extended.

Total VT conformance fixtures: 251 (across 17 categories)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "ech_over_wide_char",
+  "description": "ECH erasing over a wide char clears both cells of the wide char",
+  "initial_size": [
+    8,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41e4b896421b5b313b32481b5b3158",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "B"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+{
+  "name": "rep_wraps_at_margin",
+  "description": "REP at end of line with autowrap triggers line wrapping",
+  "initial_size": [
+    5,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3562",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 1,
+      "col": 1
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "name": "emoji_basic",
+  "description": "Basic emoji character (smiling face) renders as wide char",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41f09f988042",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\ud83d\ude00"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "B"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "korean_hangul",
+  "description": "Korean Hangul characters render as wide (2-column) chars",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "ed959ceab880",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\ud55c"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "\uae00"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
